allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''nativewind/babel''\); console.log\(typeof p, Object.keys\(p\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''babel-plugin-module-resolver''\); console.log\(typeof p, typeof p === ''object'' ? Object.keys\(p\) : ''function''\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''babel-plugin-module-resolver''\); const fn = p.default || p; console.log\(typeof fn\); const result = fn\({types: null}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(result\)\)")
